recommendations.title: Saw IV
recommendations.overview: Despite Jigsaw's death, and in order to save the lives of two of his colleagues, Lieutenant Rigg is forced to take part in a new game, which promises to test him to the limit.

recommendations.title: Saw III
recommendations.overview: Jigsaw has disappeared. Along with his new apprentice Amanda, the puppet-master behind the cruel, intricate games that have terrified a community and baffled police has once again eluded capture and vanished. While city detectives scrambles to locate

recommendations.title: Saw
recommendations.overview: Two men wake up to find themselves shackled in a grimy, abandoned bathroom. As they struggle to comprehend their predicament, they discover a disturbing tape left behind by the sadistic mastermind known as Jigsaw. With a chilling voice and cryptic in

recommendations.title: Mother's Day
recommendations.overview: Crazed members of a sadistic family return to their childhood home to terrorize the new owners.

recommendations.title: Spiral: From the Book of Saw
recommendations.overview: Working in the shadow of an esteemed police veteran, brash Detective Ezekiel “Zeke” Banks and his rookie partner take charge of a grisly investigation into murders that are eerily reminiscent of the city’s gruesome past.  Unwittingly entrapped in a d

recommendations.title: The Barrens
recommendations.overview: A man takes his family on a camping trip and becomes convinced they are being stalked by the legendary monster of the New Jersey Pine Barrens: the Jersey Devil.

recommendations.title: Abattoir
recommendations.overview: A reporter unearths an urban legend about a home being constructed from rooms where horrific tragedies have occurred.
After the death of his wife and child, an author travels to Barcelona to see his estranged brother and dying father, where he learns that his life is plagued by events that occur on 11/11/11.

recommendations.title: Saw VI
recommendations.overview: Special Agent Strahm is dead, and Detective Hoffman has emerged as the unchallenged successor to Jigsaw's legacy. However, when the FBI draws closer to Hoffman, he is forced to set a game into motion, and Jigsaw's grand scheme is finally understood.

recommendations.title: Repo! The Genetic Opera
